name: "Super Cannoneer"
description:
A Cannoneer created by a certain genius mechanical inventor. Its design may look adorable, but its firepower is far from harmless.
With enough firepower, any enemy can be taken down... right?
Before the giant cannon was put in place in Nasha Town, the inventor tested this theory by creating a multi-barreled mechanism that combined several light muskets, which she then used to ambush individual Wild Hunt members.
The result was unfortunately abysmal. This led her to the conclusion that "enough firepower" is only possible if every shot is guaranteed to cause basic damage. This is why the Cannoneers carry weapons of massive caliber.
Naturally, after it was brought into the Serenitea Pot, Tubby disabled the more hazardous features...
